questions.question: Why did the speaker say these things to the listeners?
questions.answers: So that, in him, they may have peace.

questions.question: What do believers have in the world?
questions.answers: Tribulation/affliction (they have tribulation in the world).

questions.question: What should the listeners do despite tribulation?
questions.answers: Take courage/be of good cheer (be courageous).

questions.question: Who has overcome the world?
questions.answers: The speaker has overcome the world; “I have overcome the world.”
